message:
feat(robot): integrate redaction engine with send-and-ack API

Extends the robot API's GetSendAndAck function with secret detection
and handling, ensuring programmatic callers (AI agents) have the same
protection as CLI users against accidental secret transmission.

Changes to SendAndAckOutput and SendOutput:
- Blocked: boolean indicating send was refused due to secrets
- Redaction: summary with mode, findings, categories, action taken
- Warnings: array of human-readable warning strings
- MessagePreview: now derived from (potentially redacted) message

Redaction flow:
1. Normalize config from options (defaults to mode off)
2. Scan message with applySendMessageRedaction
3. If blocked: return structured error with SENSITIVE_DATA_BLOCKED code,
   suggestion to use --allow-secret or change redact mode
4. If warn/redact: populate summary/warnings, optionally mutate message
5. Pass (potentially modified) message to existing send logic

Error handling:
- Block mode returns full SendAndAckOutput with populated error response
- AckOutput includes synthetic failure entry pointing to send phase
- ErrorCode field enables machine-parseable error categorization

Test updates:
- envelope_test: verify Warnings array serializes as [] not null
- send_test: validate redaction summary fields in JSON output
- service_layer_test: adjust for new struct fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -22,8 +22,8 @@ import (
 	"github.com/Dicklesworthstone/ntm/internal/git"
 	"github.com/Dicklesworthstone/ntm/internal/handoff"
 	"github.com/Dicklesworthstone/ntm/internal/health"
-	"github.com/Dicklesworthstone/ntm/internal/redaction"
 	"github.com/Dicklesworthstone/ntm/internal/recipe"
+	"github.com/Dicklesworthstone/ntm/internal/redaction"
 	"github.com/Dicklesworthstone/ntm/internal/status"
 	swarmlib "github.com/Dicklesworthstone/ntm/internal/swarm"
 	"github.com/Dicklesworthstone/ntm/internal/tmux"
@@ -3675,8 +3675,8 @@ type SendError struct {
 
 // SendOptions configures the PrintSend operation
 type SendOptions struct {
-	Session    string   // Target session name
-	Message    string   // Message to send
+	Session    string // Target session name
+	Message    string // Message to send
 	Redaction  redaction.Config
 	All        bool     // Send to all panes (including user)
 	Panes      []string // Specific pane indices (e.g., "0", "1", "2")

@@ -389,6 +389,9 @@ func TestSendOutputMarshal(t *testing.T) {
 	output := SendOutput{
 		Session:        "myproject",
 		SentAt:         time.Now().UTC(),
+		Blocked:        false,
+		Redaction:      RedactionSummary{Mode: "off", Findings: 0, Action: "off"},
+		Warnings:       []string{},
 		Targets:        []string{"1", "2", "3"},
 		Successful:     []string{"1", "2"},
 		Failed:         []SendError{{Pane: "3", Error: "pane not found"}},
